validationBlockers.summary: San Francisco readiness claims stay blocked until at least one proof-ready city asset exists, the rights path is explicit, and hosted review is real.

issueSeeds.title: Assemble San Francisco proof packs and publish the first proof-ready listing
issueSeeds.summary: Turn the first San Francisco rights-cleared asset into a buyer-visible proof pack with hosted-review routing.
successCriteria: At least one San Francisco proof-ready listing or equivalent proof pack exists with exact-site labeling.
The proof pack includes provenance, coverage boundaries, hosted-review routing, and next-step guidance.

issueSeeds.title: Prepare San Francisco proof-led outbound package and first touches
issueSeeds.summary: Prepare exact-site outbound for Bay Area buyers and keep the city in the proof-led lane.
successCriteria: San Francisco first-touch copy is prepared with exact-site hosted-review posture.
San Francisco stays routed to a proof-led follow-up path instead of a public readiness claim.

issueSeeds.title: Publish the San Francisco launch scorecard and blocker view
issueSeeds.summary: Keep San Francisco measurable from first outreach through proof and hosted review.
successCriteria: The scorecard reports supply, demand, proof, and hosted-review milestones using the approved event vocabulary.
Missing evidence remains explicit instead of being collapsed into narrative progress.

metricsDependencies.notes: Track inbound buyer or operator requests with city and source attribution.
Track the first buyer-visible San Francisco proof pack delivery.
Track when a hosted review is genuinely ready to open.
Track the first hosted review start.
Track when a buyer thread moves into commercial handling.
Track when proof motion stalls despite active routing.

namedClaims.subject: San Francisco, CA Capture Target Ledger
namedClaims.claim: San Francisco capture planning is hypothesis-ranked and source-tagged, not a claim that every corridor or site is already accessible.

namedClaims.subject: San Francisco, CA Demand Plan
namedClaims.claim: San Francisco demand planning stays proof-led and ecosystem-driven until rights-cleared proof assets and hosted reviews are real.
